cmdExportToBriefcaseDesc: Export the selections to a briefcase file (.bcz).
cmdImportFromBriefcaseDesc: Import the objects from a briefcase file (.bcz).
latestworkinganyonly: Latest Working Or Any Released Revision Only
singleSelectionBriefcaseExportStartedMes: "{0}" is being exported to "{1}". You will be notified upon completion.
multipleSelectionBriefcaseExportStartedM: {0} selections are being exported to "{1}". You will be notified upon completion.
singleSelectionBriefcaseValidateStartedM: "{0}" is being validated. You will be notified upon completion.
multipleSelectionBriefcaseValidateStarte: {0} selections are being validated. You will be notified upon completion.
singleSelectionBriefcaseValidateAndExpor: "{0}" is being validated and exported to "{1}". You will be notified upon completion.
multipleSelectionBriefcaseValidateAndExp: {0} selections are being validated and exported to "{1}". You will be notified upon completion.
singleSelectionBriefcaseValidateAndExpor: "{0}" was not validated and exported to "{1}". {2}.
multipleSelectionBriefcaseValidateAndExp: 0 of {0} selections were validated and exported to "{1}". {2}.
briefcaseImportStartedMessage: "{0}" is being imported. You will be notified upon completion.
cmdBriefcaseCheckOutDesc: Check out the selections for briefcase export.
cmdBriefcaseCheckInDesc: Check in the selections from the briefcase.
briefcaseCheckOutFailureSingle: "{0}" was not checked out for briefcase export.
briefcasecheckOutFailureMultiple: {0} of {1} selections were checked out for briefcase export.
briefcasePreSoaCheckoutExclusion: "{0}" was not checked out because it is not a valid type.
cancelBriefcaseCheckOutFailureSingle: The check out for "{0}" was not cancelled. {1}.
cancelBriefcaseCheckOutFailureMultiple: The check out for {0} of {1} selections were cancelled.
cancelBriefcaseCheckoutSuccess: The check out for {0} of {1} selections were cancelled.
cmdMarkOwnershipTransferDesc: Transfer ownership to another site upon briefcase export.
markOwnershipTransferFailureSingle: Ownership of "{0}" will not be transferred upon briefcase export. {1}.
markOwnershipTransferFailureMultiple: Ownership of {0} of {1} selections will be transferred upon briefcase export.
markOwnershipTransferSuccessSingle: Ownership of "{0}" will be transferred upon briefcase export.
markOwnershipTransferPreSoaCheckoutExclu: Ownership of "{0}" will not be transferred because it is not a valid type.
cmdViewOwnershipTransferDesc: View and update the objects marked for ownership transfer to another site.
cmdOwnershipTransferSelectionModeDesc: Turn on or off selection mode for making multiple selections. Turning off selection mode will clear selections.
cmdCancelTransferOwnershipDesc: Cancel the ownership transfers to another site.
cancelOwnershipTransferFailureSingle: Ownership transfer of "{0}" was not cancelled. {1}
cancelOwnershipTransferFailureMultiple: Ownership transfer of {0} of {1} selections has been cancelled.
